_note: Label Sprint round for skeleton — generated skeleton_illus.webp, cropped/keyed dark mode.
alt: Front view of the human skeleton
caption: Tap each label, then tap where it belongs on the skeleton.

hotspots.label: Skull
hotspots.detail: Encases and protects the brain; the mandible is its only movable bone.

hotspots.label: Rib cage (thoracic cage)
hotspots.detail: 12 pairs of ribs protecting the heart and lungs.

hotspots.label: Vertebral column
hotspots.detail: Chain of vertebrae from neck to pelvis; houses the spinal cord.

hotspots.label: Humerus
hotspots.detail: The long bone of the upper arm.

hotspots.label: Pelvis (hip girdle)
hotspots.detail: Connects the vertebral column to the lower limbs.

hotspots.label: Femur
hotspots.detail: The longest and strongest bone in the body — the thigh bone.

hotspots.label: Tibia and fibula
hotspots.detail: The two bones of the lower leg, below the knee.

hotspots.label: Carpals and phalanges
hotspots.detail: The small bones of the wrist and fingers.
